name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Scandal Update
body:
Judicial Watch Confronts Election Crisis

[INSIDE JW]

IMPEACHMENT STAR WITNESS WAS AWARE OF BURISMA CORRUPTION

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21451&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1EeTBNR1A1Y1EwRSZmZWF0dXJlPXlvdXR1LmJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjEyMDIzNTM1]

Turns out that one of the Democrats’ star witnesses in their sham
impeachment of President Trump – former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine
Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch – seemed to have been shading the
truth. Are you at all surprised?

We just received 210 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21442&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYmlkZW4tYnVyaXNtYS1kZWMtMjAyMC1wcm9kLTAwMjI5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIxMjAyMzUzNQ==]
of records from the State Department showing that Yovanovitch had
specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against
Burisma Holdings. However, during her November 2019 testimony in the
impeachment proceedings, Yovanovitch told lawmakers that she knew
little about Burisma.

We obtained the records in response to our FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=17536&F=T&]
filed in January 2020 seeking records of communications from the U.S.
Embassy in Kyiv mentioning Burisma (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department
of State_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=17502&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYnVyaXNtYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAyMjkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjEyMDIzNTM1]
(No. 1:20-cv-00229)).

On October 4, 2017, Michael Polt, a former ambassador to Estonia and
Serbia and who until October 2020 was Senior Director at the McCain
Institute, emailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21446&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYmlkZW4tYnVyaXNtYS1kZWMtMjAyMC1wcm9kLTAwMjI5LXBncy01LTcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjEyMDIzNTM1]
Yovanovitch regarding the McCain Institute’s plan to conduct
leadership development training for Ukrainian prosecutors that would
be funded by Burisma. The idea was suggested to Polt by Sally Painter,
Burisma’s lobbyist at Blue Star Strategies, and a Burisma executive.
In the email, Polt notes that he was introduced to Painter by U.S.
special envoy to Ukraine, Kurt Volker. Volker was also a Trump
impeachment witness.

Polt emails Yovanovitch on October 4, 2017:
Dear Masha: Greetings from the home front and all the best for your
complex assignment in Kiev! I wonder if I could pick your brain on a
leadership development we have been asked to run for Ukrainian public
prosecutors here at the McCain Institute. Kurt cannot get involved
with this, due to his other role as Special Envoy. Sally Painter of
Blue Star Strategies, whom Kurt introduced to me and then stepped
aside, together with Vadym Poharskyi of the Burisma Group have asked
us whether we could provide a two-week Leadership Development and
Professional Capacity Building program for Ukrainian public
prosecutors proposed to us by the Ukrainian Chief Prosecutor. Burisma
would fun this. We are prepared to do this, as we have done for
similar groups from the DRC [Democratic Republic of the Congo] and
from Pakistan. I would greatly appreciate your view if you know
Burisma and/or Vadym or others.

Yovanovitch, in her response, warned Polt about Burisma, writing:

Mike: Sorry not to have responded more quickly. I will get back to you
with a fuller response, but I would urge caution in dealing with the
Burisma Group. It is widely believed that the owner was the
beneficiary of the corrupt justice system here and I think –to the
extent that anyone is aware that Burisma is funding the training
–there would be raised eyebrows in Kyiv over the irony of Burisma
training prosecutors and to what end.

I’d also note that the PGO [Prosecutor General’s Office] is one of
the entities here that remains resolutely unreformed. After a year and
a half of trying, we pulled out and reprogrammed our resources into
other areas in the justice sector that were ready for change. Wish I
had better news and will get back to you with more details.

In a November 7, 2017, email to Yovanovitch, Polt indicates that he is
taking her “sage advice” and “not moving forward” with
Burisma’s funding of the training.

During her November 15, 2019, testimony
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21444&F=T&]
before the House Intelligence Committee in the impeachment
proceedings, Yovanovitch said she didn’t have much knowledge about
Burisma, and noted that she only learned of its connection to the
Biden family through “press reports” she read while preparing for
her Senate confirmation hearing.

The new production of records from the State Department also includes
several emails regarding the U.S. Embassy in Kyiv’s response to John
Solomon’s reporting for _The Hill_. The emails are almost entirely
redacted, as are the names of the officials involved. In one email
regarding this effort, an unidentified official cites a report by the
George Soros-funded Anti-Corruption Action Center defending itself
against the reporting as a “useful reference point.”

The U.S. Embassy in Kyiv closely monitored
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=20358&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcmVjb3Jkcy1zaG93LW1vbml0b3JpbmctdWtyYWluZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=]
media and social media reaction to many conservatives and journalists
in potential violation of federal law.

Marie Yovanovitch knew much more about Burisma than what she revealed
in her testimony at the sham impeachment hearings. We will continue
our efforts to unearth the shady details in the Burisma-Biden scandal
that is not going to go away.

We have been busy uncovering other details of this scandal.

In October we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21053&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZGVtLWxvYmJ5aW5nLWZpcm0tdWtyYWluZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=]
from the State Department that included a briefing checklist of a
February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between Yovanovitch and Painter.
The briefing checklist noted that Painter also planned to meet with
Foreign Commercial Service (FCS) Officer Martin Claessens “regarding
the Burisma Group energy company.”

At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden, son of former Vice President
Joe Biden, was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings,
a Ukrainian energy firm, despite having no previous experience in the
energy industry. Biden served on the board of Burisma until his term
expired in April 2019.

In September 2020 we made public
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=20566&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcnVzc2lhbnMtdHJvbGxpbmctam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIxMjAyMzUzNQ==]
records that show George Kent, the Obama administration’s deputy
assistant secretary of state in charge of Ukraine policy, which was
copied to Yovanovitch, highlighting Russia-linked media “trolling”
Joe Biden over “his son’s business.”

In a related case we uncovered records showing the U.S. embassy in
Ukraine monitoring
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=20358&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcmVjb3Jkcy1zaG93LW1vbml0b3JpbmctdWtyYWluZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=],
in potential violation of law, Donald Trump, Jr., Rudy Giuliani and
major journalists on Twitter on their commentary on Ukraine,
“Biden-Burisma 2020,” and George Soros. The search terms flagged
to be monitored by State Department officials on social media included
Yovanovitch, Ukraine Ambassador, Ukrainian Ambassador, Ukraine Soros,
Clinton campaign, and Biden-Burisma.

With Hunter Biden’s admission this week that the FBI is
investigating him, the Burisma scandal is a fetid mess. And no matter
what corrupted FBI and compromised DOJ do, you can trust Judicial
Watch to keep on battling in court for the truth about Biden family
corruption.

EX-CON HIRED BY D.C. AS ‘VIOLENCE INTERRUPTER’ CHARGED WITH MURDER

Your capital city, Washington D.C., is revealing the danger of the
Left’s soft on crime agenda. It’s a city clamoring
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21452&F=T&]
to defund the police while hiring – and even celebrating – a man
arrested for murder. You will be appalled as you read our _Corruption
Chronicles_ report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21453&F=T&

In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of
Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been
arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded
public safety program known as Cure the Streets
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21454&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vYWcuZGMuZ292L3B1YmxpYy1zYWZldHkvY3VyZS1zdHJlZXRzLW9hZ3MtdmlvbGVuY2UtaW50ZXJydXB0aW9uLXByb2dyYW0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=]
launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence
by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from
spreading.

Cure the Streets typically hires men and women with criminal histories
as violence interrupters because they know first-hand about the
challenges that residents of crime-infested communities live with.
Racine, who was reelected to a second term in 2018, says the
transformed criminals hired by his program perform community-driven
public safety work that can avoid using police.

Here is how they carry out the task, according to Racine’s office:
By interrupting potentially violent conflicts because they have
relationships and influence within targeted neighborhoods. Violence
interrupters “engage with the community to learn about brewing
conflicts and resolve them peaceably before they erupt in violence,”
the program’s website states. Violence interrupters also identify
and treat individuals at high risk for involvement with violence by
meeting with them and implementing individualized risk reduction
plans. “They also help connect participants with needed services,
such as housing, counseling and employment assistance, and develop
action plans for a positive future.” Finally, the D.C. Attorney
General claims violence interrupters mobilize communities to change
norms by engaging residents, local businesses, community leaders and
faith leaders to work with high-risk individuals to reduce violence.
“CTS works with these partners to organize forums and public events
where residents can gather and interact safely without fear of
conflict and violence,” the D.C. government website claims. It is
not clear what impact Cure the Streets is having on violent crime in
the District, but the Metropolitan Police Department reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21455&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tcGRjLmRjLmdvdi9wYWdlL2Rpc3RyaWN0LWNyaW1lLWRhdGEtZ2xhbmNlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjEyMDIzNTM1]
that homicides
are up 20% from last year.

The program operates in notoriously high-crime sections throughout
D.C., which are broken down by wards. They include Eckington/Truxton
and Trinidad in Ward 5, Marshall Heights/Benning Heights in Ward 7 and
Bellevue, Washington Highlands, and Congress Heights in Ward 8. The
Cure the Streets employee recently charged with murder was a
supervisor who led a team of six violence interrupters and outreach
workers. His name is Cotey Wynn, an ex-con with an extensive rap sheet
who served a decade in prison before D.C.’s chief legal officer
hired him. Wynn’s record
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21456&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tcGRjLmRjLmdvdi9yZWxlYXNlL2FycmVzdC1tYWRlLTIwMTctaG9taWNpZGUtOTAwLWJsb2NrLTEydGgtc3RyZWV0LW5vcnRoZWFzdD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIxMjAyMzUzNQ==]
includes felony murder, first degree murder, possession with intent to
distribute crack cocaine, and distribution of a controlled substance,
according to the Metropolitan Police Department. On December 4, the
agency’s Capital Area Fugitive Task Force arrested the 39-year-old
Wynn and charged him with second degree murder while armed. At the
time of his arrest Wynn was under the supervision of the Pretrial
Services Agency for the District of Columbia, a federal agency that
believes preventative detention should only be a last resort
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21457&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHNhLmdvdi8/cT1hYm91dC9taXNzaW9uX3Zpc2lvbiZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIxMjAyMzUzNQ==]
for defendants, who
should live in the least restrictive conditions while awaiting court.

Police say Wynn fatally shot a 53-year-old man named Eric Linnair
Wright in 2017 near the Trinidad neighborhood in Northeast Washington.
The violence interrupter was identified by multiple witnesses after
viewing security camera footage from nearby homes, according to
police. Authorities also tracked Wynn’s cell phone to the location
of the crime. In a statement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94NWRjLmNvbS9uZXdzL2RjLXZpb2xlbmNlLWludGVycnVwdGVyLWNoYXJnZWQtaW4tY29ubmVjdGlvbi13aXRoLTIwMTctaG9taWNpZGU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=]
issued to local media, Racine’s spokesperson said this: “The
Office of the Attorney General is aware of Mr. Wynn’s arrest for a
homicide he is alleged to have committed in 2017, prior to his
employment with Cure the Streets. This case will now proceed through
our criminal justice system where Mr. Wynn is presumed innocent. We
are confident that justice will be served once this process is
complete. Our hearts go out to the family of Mr. Wright, the victim in
this case, and to the affected members of the community. The important
work of the Cure the Streets team will continue.”

It was not that long ago that the same office, charged with enforcing
D.C. laws and protecting the interest of its citizens, bragged about
what a great guy Wynn is. In a profile
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vYWcuZGMuZ292L2Jsb2cvY3VyZS1zdHJlZXRzLXNwb3RsaWdodC1jb3RleS13eW5uP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjEyMDIzNTM1]
posted on
the Attorney General’s website over the summer, Wynn was portrayed
as somewhat of a saint. “When observing Cotey at work, you see a
respected professional, a loving father, a devoted friend, and a
pillar of the community,” according to the piece which includes a
photo of the accused murderer delivering resources to D.C. residents
during COIVD-19. The story also reveals that Wynn could not find a job
after a decade in prison since “the damage to his reputation made it
hard for him to find employment” so D.C. government hired him as a
violence interrupter for Cure the Streets.

Stay safe out there.

JUDICIAL WATCH CONFRONTS THE ELECTION CRISIS

Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, provides
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21460&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaHMtYmF0dGxlLXdpdGgtYmFsbG90LWZyYXVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIxMjAyMzUzNQ==]
a good summary of our work over the years for election integrity in
his latest Investigative Bulletin:

President Trump has been pounding the bully pulpit about the integrity
of the electoral system as he battles for a second term. We know how
he feels. Judicial Watch litigation teams have been working for years
to clean up dirty voting rolls. Here’s the president in a December 2
speech
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21447&F=T&

“It’s a widely known fact that the voting rolls are packed with
people who are not lawfully eligible to vote, including those who are
deceased, have moved out of their state, and even non-citizens of our
country. Beyond this, the records are riddled with errors, wrong
addresses, duplicate entries, and many other issues.”

That’s not a surprise to Judicial Watch supporters. We’ve
extensively reported on our legal fights to clean up dirty voter
rolls, many of them in battleground states. Under the National Voter
Registration Act, states are required to remove “inactive voters”
from registration rolls if they do not respond to an address
confirmation notice and then fail to vote in the next two general
federal elections. Many “inactive voters” in fact have died or
moved to a new location.

In October, we published a groundbreaking study
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=21448&F=T&]
analyzing data that showed there are at least 1.8 million of these
“ghost voters” spread across more than 350 counties in 29 states.
The data revealed eight states where the number of registered voters
actually exceeds 100% of eligible voting-age citizens in the state!
That dubious distinction goes to Alaska, Colorado, Maine, Maryland,
Michigan, New Jersey, Rhode Island, and Vermont.

Dirty voting rolls are a breeding ground for fraud. The Judicial Watch
study “highlights the recklessness of mailing blindly ballots and
ballot applications to voter registration lists,” says Judicial
Watch President Tom Fitton. “Dirty voting rolls can mean dirty
elections.”

Earlier this year, we sued Pennsylvania for failing to make reasonable
efforts to remove ineligible voters from their rolls, as required by
the NVRA. The state set out a ludicrously low level of inactive names
eligible for removal under the NVRA, as we reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=20872&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9iYWxsb3QtdXBkYXRlLWp1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLWNsZWFucy11cC1kaXJ0eS12b3Rlci1yb2xscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=]
in October. The state initially claimed that in one county of 457,000
registrants, it had found _only eight inactive names_ eligible for
removal. In another county of 357,000 registrants, _only five names
had been removed_. In a third county of 403,000 registrants, _only
four names_ were removed.

Pennsylvania has since revised its numbers, admitting it had reported
incorrect information
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=20680&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVubi1jb3VudGllcy1pbmNvcnJlY3Qtdm90ZXItaW5mby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTIwMjM1MzU=]
to a federal agency on the removal of ineligible voters. But even the
new figures are too low. Pennsylvania now admits that in eighteen
other counties—which together contain twenty-five percent of the
entire state’s registered voters—it removed a grand total of
fifteen inactive, ineligible voters in a two-year period.

We also went to court in Colorado, where studies have shown that a
majority of the state’s counties have registration rates that exceed
100% of the voting-age population. Our lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=20863&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjAvMTAvSlctdi1Hcmlzd29sZC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI5OTIucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjEyMDIzNTM1]
charges “an ongoing, systemic problem with Colorado’s voter list
maintenance obligations.”

We filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=18485&F=T&]
in North Carolina for the same reason—large numbers of ineligible
voters on the state voter rolls. By our estimate, North Carolina has
nearly one million inactive voters on its rolls.

We’ve warned five states—Pennsylvania, Colorado, North Carolina,
California, and Virginia—to clean up their dirty voter rolls
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=17146&F=T&].
In California, we uncovered 1.6 million inactive voters on electoral
rolls and sued, forcing Los Angeles County to clean up its act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=17104&F=T&].

We’ve successfully taken on Ohio, Kentucky, and Indiana as well. In
Ohio, a Supreme Court decision upheld
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=17110&F=T&]
a voter-roll cleanup stemming from a Judicial Watch lawsuit. In
Kentucky, we sued for a voter-roll cleanup and won
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=17111&F=T&].
Indiana agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52250&L=18615&F=T&]
to clean up its rolls after Judicial Watch launched an investigation.

Judicial Watch is happy to see President Trump take on election
integrity issues. When it comes to voting rolls, he’s right. We’ll
keep fighting to clean them up, no matter who occupies the Oval
Office.

Until next week...

clean_body: Judicial Watch Confronts Election Crisis [INSIDE JW] IMPEACHMENT STAR WITNESS WAS AWARE OF BURISMA CORRUPTION [] Turns out that one of the Democrats’ star witnesses in their sham impeachment of President Trump – former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch – seemed to have been shading the truth. Are you at all surprised? We just received 210 pages [==] of records from the State Department showing that Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. However, during her November 2019 testimony in the impeachment proceedings, Yovanovitch told lawmakers that she knew little about Burisma. We obtained the records in response to our FOIA lawsuit [=] filed in January 2020 seeking records of communications from the U.S. Embassy in Kyiv mentioning Burisma (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:20-cv-00229)). On October 4, 2017, Michael Polt, a former ambassador to Estonia and Serbia and who until October 2020 was Senior Director at the McCain Institute, emailed [] Yovanovitch regarding the McCain Institute’s plan to conduct leadership development training for Ukrainian prosecutors that would be funded by Burisma. The idea was suggested to Polt by Sally Painter, Burisma’s lobbyist at Blue Star Strategies, and a Burisma executive. In the email, Polt notes that he was introduced to Painter by U.S. special envoy to Ukraine, Kurt Volker. Volker was also a Trump impeachment witness. Polt emails Yovanovitch on October 4, 2017: Dear Masha: Greetings from the home front and all the best for your complex assignment in Kiev! I wonder if I could pick your brain on a leadership development we have been asked to run for Ukrainian public prosecutors here at the McCain Institute. Kurt cannot get involved with this, due to his other role as Special Envoy. Sally Painter of Blue Star Strategies, whom Kurt introduced to me and then stepped aside, together with Vadym Poharskyi of the Burisma Group have asked us whether we could provide a two-week Leadership Development and Professional Capacity Building program for Ukrainian public prosecutors proposed to us by the Ukrainian Chief Prosecutor. Burisma would fun this. We are prepared to do this, as we have done for similar groups from the DRC [Democratic Republic of the Congo] and from Pakistan. I would greatly appreciate your view if you know Burisma and/or Vadym or others. Yovanovitch, in her response, warned Polt about Burisma, writing: Mike: Sorry not to have responded more quickly. I will get back to you with a fuller response, but I would urge caution in dealing with the Burisma Group. It is widely believed that the owner was the beneficiary of the corrupt justice system here and I think –to the extent that anyone is aware that Burisma is funding the training –there would be raised eyebrows in Kyiv over the irony of Burisma training prosecutors and to what end. I’d also note that the PGO [Prosecutor General’s Office] is one of the entities here that remains resolutely unreformed. After a year and a half of trying, we pulled out and reprogrammed our resources into other areas in the justice sector that were ready for change. Wish I had better news and will get back to you with more details. In a November 7, 2017, email to Yovanovitch, Polt indicates that he is taking her “sage advice” and “not moving forward” with Burisma’s funding of the training. During her November 15, 2019, testimony [==] before the House Intelligence Committee in the impeachment proceedings, Yovanovitch said she didn’t have much knowledge about Burisma, and noted that she only learned of its connection to the Biden family through “press reports” she read while preparing for her Senate confirmation hearing. The new production of records from the State Department also includes several emails regarding the U.S. Embassy in Kyiv’s response to John Solomon’s reporting for The Hill. The emails are almost entirely redacted, as are the names of the officials involved. In one email regarding this effort, an unidentified official cites a report by the George Soros-funded Anti-Corruption Action Center defending itself against the reporting as a “useful reference point.” The U.S. Embassy in Kyiv closely monitored [=] media and social media reaction to many conservatives and journalists in potential violation of federal law. Marie Yovanovitch knew much more about Burisma than what she revealed in her testimony at the sham impeachment hearings. We will continue our efforts to unearth the shady details in the Burisma-Biden scandal that is not going to go away. We have been busy uncovering other details of this scandal. In October we received records [=] from the State Department that included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between Yovanovitch and Painter. The briefing checklist noted that Painter also planned to meet with Foreign Commercial Service (FCS) Officer Martin Claessens “regarding the Burisma Group energy company.” At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden, son of former Vice President Joe Biden, was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings, a Ukrainian energy firm, despite having no previous experience in the energy industry. Biden served on the board of Burisma until his term expired in April 2019. In September 2020 we made public [==] records that show George Kent, the Obama administration’s deputy assistant secretary of state in charge of Ukraine policy, which was copied to Yovanovitch, highlighting Russia-linked media “trolling” Joe Biden over “his son’s business.” In a related case we uncovered records showing the U.S. embassy in Ukraine monitoring [=], in potential violation of law, Donald Trump, Jr., Rudy Giuliani and major journalists on Twitter on their commentary on Ukraine, “Biden-Burisma 2020,” and George Soros. The search terms flagged to be monitored by State Department officials on social media included Yovanovitch, Ukraine Ambassador, Ukrainian Ambassador, Ukraine Soros, Clinton campaign, and Biden-Burisma. With Hunter Biden’s admission this week that the FBI is investigating him, the Burisma scandal is a fetid mess. And no matter what corrupted FBI and compromised DOJ do, you can trust Judicial Watch to keep on battling in court for the truth about Biden family corruption. EX-CON HIRED BY D.C. AS ‘VIOLENCE INTERRUPTER’ CHARGED WITH MURDER Your capital city, Washington D.C., is revealing the danger of the Left’s soft on crime agenda. It’s a city clamoring [=] to defund the police while hiring – and even celebrating – a man arrested for murder. You will be appalled as you read our Corruption Chronicles report [== In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets [=] launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading. Cure the Streets typically hires men and women with criminal histories as violence interrupters because they know first-hand about the challenges that residents of crime-infested communities live with. Racine, who was reelected to a second term in 2018, says the transformed criminals hired by his program perform community-driven public safety work that can avoid using police. Here is how they carry out the task, according to Racine’s office: By interrupting potentially violent conflicts because they have relationships and influence within targeted neighborhoods. Violence interrupters “engage with the community to learn about brewing conflicts and resolve them peaceably before they erupt in violence,” the program’s website states. Violence interrupters also identify and treat individuals at high risk for involvement with violence by meeting with them and implementing individualized risk reduction plans. “They also help connect participants with needed services, such as housing, counseling and employment assistance, and develop action plans for a positive future.” Finally, the D.C. Attorney General claims violence interrupters mobilize communities to change norms by engaging residents, local businesses, community leaders and faith leaders to work with high-risk individuals to reduce violence. “CTS works with these partners to organize forums and public events where residents can gather and interact safely without fear of conflict and violence,” the D.C. government website claims. It is not clear what impact Cure the Streets is having on violent crime in the District, but the Metropolitan Police Department reports [] that homicides are up 20% from last year. The program operates in notoriously high-crime sections throughout D.C., which are broken down by wards. They include Eckington/Truxton and Trinidad in Ward 5, Marshall Heights/Benning Heights in Ward 7 and Bellevue, Washington Highlands, and Congress Heights in Ward 8. The Cure the Streets employee recently charged with murder was a supervisor who led a team of six violence interrupters and outreach workers. His name is Cotey Wynn, an ex-con with an extensive rap sheet who served a decade in prison before D.C.’s chief legal officer hired him. Wynn’s record [==] includes felony murder, first degree murder, possession with intent to distribute crack cocaine, and distribution of a controlled substance, according to the Metropolitan Police Department. On December 4, the agency’s Capital Area Fugitive Task Force arrested the 39-year-old Wynn and charged him with second degree murder while armed. At the time of his arrest Wynn was under the supervision of the Pretrial Services Agency for the District of Columbia, a federal agency that believes preventative detention should only be a last resort [==] for defendants, who should live in the least restrictive conditions while awaiting court. Police say Wynn fatally shot a 53-year-old man named Eric Linnair Wright in 2017 near the Trinidad neighborhood in Northeast Washington. The violence interrupter was identified by multiple witnesses after viewing security camera footage from nearby homes, according to police. Authorities also tracked Wynn’s cell phone to the location of the crime. In a statement [=] issued to local media, Racine’s spokesperson said this: “The Office of the Attorney General is aware of Mr. Wynn’s arrest for a homicide he is alleged to have committed in 2017, prior to his employment with Cure the Streets. This case will now proceed through our criminal justice system where Mr. Wynn is presumed innocent. We are confident that justice will be served once this process is complete. Our hearts go out to the family of Mr. Wright, the victim in this case, and to the affected members of the community. The important work of the Cure the Streets team will continue.” It was not that long ago that the same office, charged with enforcing D.C. laws and protecting the interest of its citizens, bragged about what a great guy Wynn is. In a profile [] posted on the Attorney General’s website over the summer, Wynn was portrayed as somewhat of a saint. “When observing Cotey at work, you see a respected professional, a loving father, a devoted friend, and a pillar of the community,” according to the piece which includes a photo of the accused murderer delivering resources to D.C. residents during COIVD-19. The story also reveals that Wynn could not find a job after a decade in prison since “the damage to his reputation made it hard for him to find employment” so D.C. government hired him as a violence interrupter for Cure the Streets. Stay safe out there. JUDICIAL WATCH CONFRONTS THE ELECTION CRISIS Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, provides [==] a good summary of our work over the years for election integrity in his latest Investigative Bulletin: President Trump has been pounding the bully pulpit about the integrity of the electoral system as he battles for a second term. We know how he feels. Judicial Watch litigation teams have been working for years to clean up dirty voting rolls. Here’s the president in a December 2 speech [== “It’s a widely known fact that the voting rolls are packed with people who are not lawfully eligible to vote, including those who are deceased, have moved out of their state, and even non-citizens of our country. Beyond this, the records are riddled with errors, wrong addresses, duplicate entries, and many other issues.” That’s not a surprise to Judicial Watch supporters. We’ve extensively reported on our legal fights to clean up dirty voter rolls, many of them in battleground states. Under the National Voter Registration Act, states are required to remove “inactive voters” from registration rolls if they do not respond to an address confirmation notice and then fail to vote in the next two general federal elections. Many “inactive voters” in fact have died or moved to a new location. In October, we published a groundbreaking study [] analyzing data that showed there are at least 1.8 million of these “ghost voters” spread across more than 350 counties in 29 states. The data revealed eight states where the number of registered voters actually exceeds 100% of eligible voting-age citizens in the state! That dubious distinction goes to Alaska, Colorado, Maine, Maryland, Michigan, New Jersey, Rhode Island, and Vermont. Dirty voting rolls are a breeding ground for fraud. The Judicial Watch study “highlights the recklessness of mailing blindly ballots and ballot applications to voter registration lists,” says Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Dirty voting rolls can mean dirty elections.” Earlier this year, we sued Pennsylvania for failing to make reasonable efforts to remove ineligible voters from their rolls, as required by the NVRA. The state set out a ludicrously low level of inactive names eligible for removal under the NVRA, as we reported [=] in October. The state initially claimed that in one county of 457,000 registrants, it had found only eight inactive names eligible for removal. In another county of 357,000 registrants, only five names had been removed. In a third county of 403,000 registrants, only four names were removed. Pennsylvania has since revised its numbers, admitting it had reported incorrect information [=] to a federal agency on the removal of ineligible voters. But even the new figures are too low. Pennsylvania now admits that in eighteen other counties—which together contain twenty-five percent of the entire state’s registered voters—it removed a grand total of fifteen inactive, ineligible voters in a two-year period. We also went to court in Colorado, where studies have shown that a majority of the state’s counties have registration rates that exceed 100% of the voting-age population. Our lawsuit [] charges “an ongoing, systemic problem with Colorado’s voter list maintenance obligations.” We filed a lawsuit [] in North Carolina for the same reason—large numbers of ineligible voters on the state voter rolls. By our estimate, North Carolina has nearly one million inactive voters on its rolls. We’ve warned five states—Pennsylvania, Colorado, North Carolina, California, and Virginia—to clean up their dirty voter rolls [==]. In California, we uncovered 1.6 million inactive voters on electoral rolls and sued, forcing Los Angeles County to clean up its act [==]. We’ve successfully taken on Ohio, Kentucky, and Indiana as well. In Ohio, a Supreme Court decision upheld [=] a voter-roll cleanup stemming from a Judicial Watch lawsuit. In Kentucky, we sued for a voter-roll cleanup and won [==]. Indiana agreed [=] to clean up its rolls after Judicial Watch launched an investigation. Judicial Watch is happy to see President Trump take on election integrity issues. When it comes to voting rolls, he’s right. We’ll keep fighting to clean them up, no matter who occupies the Oval Office. Until next week... name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: WARNOCK KICKS OFF HANUKKAH BY CAMPAIGNING WITH ANTI-SEMITIC EXTREMIST GROUP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, DECEMBER 12, 2020 WARNOCK KICKS OFF HANUKKAH BY CAMPAIGNING WITH ANTI-SEMITIC EXTREMIST GROUP
ATLANTA - This Sunday, the Georgia branch of the extreme Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR) will hold a virtual "[vote-a-thon](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiexo2YIbV6Ar1fHaXm0QCzMytzH7aAs6g1J_4B1Jr0OkzzGHBmJ4v5BTWwzHBTNJ2K9bUgdvM7vi33mBUOmNBQSe7PlKBLYUGg0bdNyiVPU-x1zpxMwxJDn6fCLQddCyt&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==)" to encourage voting for Raphael Warnock. Warnock has previous ties to CAIR, including hosting the organization at [outreach events](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiZ2vd0Zi_FZEh_uwwW4I3A5kz_-RbrvEVXt-mfGCjBt8SmGYk3HueL6Ap2PUaIk-ZkeKuCjYPPsRyfsI0NBk241eqSd1ovayhJc6M0Tw2wrBBvxROWNnRbQvitOkJBknkw955We5cPUc0s4PKyt_vgE-XfI75e4bos4XCa8Nj5j4BF5gODeMwPdQ9KwdyYdw7EDq954j2arRX8DAXs25YzVbiCn6yanTtIWlQ63gRWYqwhrW8wodpTcgWaeDUxbjN7lL31ai5grvVx7G9Gm_Pbg==&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) at Ebenezer Baptist.
CAIR and its leaders have a well-documented history of taking anti-Semitic, anti-Israel positions, including [backing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiRlRrOqljar9GW5zn86XkPjyoPU4gRskuSXP59K-5cMFKdw_QSazOtkDy0U3l6HgmavXo_VpkQPFE6Vgae-U-CD2eiaGx5L9iTWlbXNAtU80aYigF5ncIr20iqk8JebZw5tzD_KohPrNOxEU70MAHC8xXJg-RRL02qJbAEt38LbO7ERY1k9G7OQ==&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) the boycott-divestment-sanctions (BDS) movement, [accusing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiO3omsu3Vj0S9sORBtcH_hPRjb03GCPWfNVcHFirhGiEo_UWWgDKdydIIQfSwdJOvRlwaT3iQiGBUXkaPHT3uN9ugR9AKTatG1_OufSqbtft6WL-ESomh1YaNB49fSsddg45VKlNBb91g_cS0hAQ3VwJfdt1EUePruXNMgJqFf4rMynmnnmqheLM1nBv9px3pmLcQcMf1vQ3kKtLiLYs4JH0EHEiza2_ICmB7Rx2TaeHdrtKc1k45qD-blkK7tlbh42RadaoJ7t8=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) American Jews of using the Holocaust to deflect criticism of Israel, and even amplifying the voices of notorious anti-Semites such as [Ilhan Omar](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLi31YvzjBceNdnGXLcVB752ilPkoZf4_tUXAO8lOnf6wxVDnVD1A15t0jRmEFk7kIsLEvdePcomtyuOwLHHz3piATGYHq4XrOsPQDXSOV0neHDu_1OogwfVrxXwBXUdCUSd7DYsDWxRF9QchT3rXsocmHYa3VxdhCnSc7W535tjAPgJ2NfChQKcg==&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) and [Rashida](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiMfuQ2Ff4QkBBFsbJfGO9RbX3q11c901Q5Wqx5gYqF63HCUWKpoGxdl3ODMN9Tky25EwHrY_a0aoUxIRL67BKbWdnh_eUnArqFMqqq-06Uxlz7or7YgwSl2s5QPTuiNI2vBxNPhFdpBA=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) [Tlaib](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLigIC_3SDVK-yRYmxCXkKSWFx8VjWVMh1ewaZLxH5Tp8GstEao7W-SJ6O1UsNeXtaIkxbupMnZpkBdgnJe90dgBc8ca4Qtff1Kbaw-w72xCCqnbPZb5Hmf0gPVs_GJmjV3xOGcA44t865mlNYXsg1vS7T_8EW8wMJfuqXih9xPobg8CR4Wgha0yhuT7WzHL_yXEvldHAPQvw8=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) - both of whom are participating in CAIR's campaign event tomorrow night for Warnock.
But that's not all. The FBI [concluded](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiPe00RGdkpPhlFx0PeuIo8ep1El4GX6mU0b1-UfUbbTLPByz77wOK-HFzprdjS_TpmJFP-gUIM1SKO_lNWKfU7aQpALXcsIPs3PS_UXNBozLFDuCGwp2JhHJIO0rzAUY0RQ_k4gLZFFDEKRCGCfbSkMXUCcLVPNFBJslbHO9vAI0=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) CAIR has supported Hamas and Hezbollah - which is likely why they [refuse](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLiR5M-mMRMJMUGEc3g3tYWOCkdNIyYpw1-QjWzZ-hnzOV4BTwkit_wCZWTOEGjRmGuERMuJZf2JsYWX2cbqy0icLG3Y4OZ-_8sI3U09yBM7pNkPZy_GcwJhMu-4jcg03MWe-6AivctFbJ4n8Gal4zi03mUQx7YQeNQ&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) to condemn these known terrorist groups. Last year, CAIR's executive director [stated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLibswmCcXh8sVr1Bv2D2dXlAh6OU30Gh1krqGomfatj36UMfiNPGJ3h5bHGbcEvO_x4EZTQ3X8IumEBJ_ySGkRSbVbeMsWKS1UQBy7g2-JzRwnL7qRwIRo6hJOqY7-jzaSjh61Ragcjkz7a5jQHqBd4usGYptKTSVYjDSGrCOGmNXcdaNOCZEShDqDczE9K7sn&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) the group combats "racism, Islamophobia, and Zionism," conflating outright bigotry with simply believing that the Jewish State should exist. That same executive director previously [worked](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLi1GiUjuu4LLDICGStqzfnTvrD0ls3STcV27j7cALlR3q2te-yThr9MputeKv1-9thtW2REhjGEbdWpVGSPvgsiC7wcR5pwN4s8yA6U1jjFTIZBhOJ7R2L8BGtdNKQxXW0ULe95BrxeGZkTEkP-06vErcpgYgNP_xtGu3Jzwy3OA8=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) with groups created and designed by the Muslim Brotherhood - another terrorist organization - to support Hamas financially and politically.
It's no surprise to see such a radical fringe group support Raphael Warnock. On Israel, CAIR and Warnock's beliefs align perfectly. Warnock has been repeatedly [exposed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDuWicSlaLIzZqHZGbl9OxnaZCguxw4Fwr31HS8Kj_ZTGMzwmCB6RF-U8az74qYRB3uz2yqUA-GI8WGP9fJdJUTylH4v43AFi6gNGl_JwIW54mJ9N0qQFBFUvYrtaz1P8iODFaadq9seyp_kGzf00EvBig3vcqyEYI828MLY-K_Vnt_daO2Agr2FTogSnK70U_w==&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) for his anti-Israel positions, including:

* [Accusing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLis1edaCp4Le6i4oS21suWJ2gJlIqaEtSIwj1wba6spAgOoXykINhCgurOMzs4KNfE4bMzxjEavVmsbfLiG1wo9LqmXIaYHVRBpltEbhKVqoTICEr5B-GMOIqRgyRndlv3dDiG_XFxspDQ2YN5pufHlpm2jZjIN838_0MHU4sYU8krrB7H5brqj0nxWzZDuaqN&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) Israel of "shooting down unarmed" Palestinians "like birds of prey
* [Celebrating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDoXQIWpSUZWQPWSE3BqiyYK7aE4jkHhX-wpCf2fJ4NMAlCONMICCfUGrfxzf3zRvxKo58XbNl9gZtt6-vEsmM831EfkIf9_aH_LyX3Nri0ERAzY8pibCGUfg1fzAGNFAy3_ZlnsyNP7DGaO5pNsH8z_FXMfG50KZEkls1KJgXwn1_jAimITyEl-HtHe04SL7IviWeUtcjof5&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) anti-Semite Jeremiah Wright, even calling him a prophet
* [Calling](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDrzlIBmxQPLi4q-ZvXN94fRB_V-xHEKrmeJJaIPHsKpA6q6w6FfpeQHygSWGQlLIade2ZLRzFx6LOk2oc9vagLJPsg0wFLFmivnwAV3CahxW2kRIQNzL8haGaeodmjm55mja4ATDSFciaDwXYEoRg2T2zmaUfga1OQ==&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) for an end to all U.S. military aid to Israel
* [Comparing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDoXQIWpSUZWQLXP_0LiqStaxPVVc3lgEzM1ee7M4AxPOb_mJFHOEMYGF3K-NY1-0OScCj_hWl3uD3d3VxcwRK0np5vBPbZvTbhWM2qbVe8FUxP-Rc95BNl75erm4MxK9bpIj0RMCouU0yXqMVvigVYY=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) Israel to apartheid South Africa
* [Comparing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mKsbxLvxapgVMil2srvWSLgssUEkXSq4J_My5tfboM4SLMEAZYDNDuWicSlaLIzZ4ZQwrxUuEE4Fk_dqqgWE7T_R9nKigqTzGmBXw8fvH2NQfJ5-QgOJbkl8cjW6-wugQAhUIDx37KAzOy0qAyDTOAfVSgzDz594X3bREYmF0CNOpxGQ3EHjPIscft2MQp1hH6ghikqEMGK_6zrGTxlm2qNRHrJqftKLJMh8qCkNEIEBl0COduV0d4aj4OA9yOX1HnXGw5cwO1kFxVcqhadjgARB-V7z7YvlUgS772ppAW4=&c=nbbKtUsVHhxKnx7ZqNY5BQ3jQR6sUsGLBdjM3LwjZhwagfTUvJbMvQ==&ch=BWZiARjxlNazdxJ7uoxCHSvjeInDU8XZWP7xNdotC5FnGHZhCkDbHw==) Benjamin Netanyahu to George Wallace and accusing him of using "racist and vicious language"

Raphael Warnock's anti-Israel bias, along with his clear ties to such an extreme, anti-Semitic group, should be completely disqualifying with the Jewish community, and on January 5th, they will soundly reject him.
---

But that's not all. The FBI == CAIR has supported Hamas and Hezbollah - which is likely why they == to condemn these known terrorist groups. Last year, CAIR's executive director == the group combats "racism, Islamophobia, and Zionism," conflating outright bigotry with simply believing that the Jewish State should exist. That same executive director previously == with groups created and designed by the Muslim Brotherhood - another terrorist organization - to support Hamas financially and politically. It's no surprise to see such a radical fringe group support Raphael Warnock. On Israel, CAIR and Warnock's beliefs align perfectly. Warnock has been repeatedly == for his anti-Israel positions, including: == Israel of "shooting down unarmed" Palestinians "like birds of prey == anti-Semite Jeremiah Wright, even calling him a prophet == for an end to all U.S. military aid to Israel == Israel to apartheid South Africa * == Benjamin Netanyahu to George Wallace and accusing him of using "racist and vicious language" Raphael Warnock's anti-Israel bias, along with his clear ties to such an extreme, anti-Semitic group, should be completely disqualifying with the Jewish community, and on January 5th, they will soundly reject him. | ### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager == | Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075 | | Sent by mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com powered by

clean_body: | | | Derek, Donald Trump may be a one-term President, but the Virginia GOP is determined to keep Trumpism alive and well in the Commonwealth. For years, the Virginia GOP has put Donald Trump and radical right-wing politics ahead of what’s best for Virginians. And now, the Republican Governors Association has set this race as their top target for 2021. That means they'll flood in millions to prop up Terry's far-right opponents while attacking Terry with an onslaught of negative ads. This race won't be easy but Terry has never backed down from tough fights before. | | | | | More soon, Gwen Gwen Rocco Deputy Campaign Manager Terry for Virginia Paid for by Terry for Virginia | | Sent via . [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NXh19ffb7_E46IttEAetzqvxEP5vL4QrlNrwkyXgxZMj5KFpDH5hwnM0nGPBUDTP06d2eNuB8uPffVuirr2kerke6hyruXGYPGdUlWPdwnvuuNfyXVbeHIOF1VjgnrnkV84FF7lzv1Jw_-ncYKyIkgHHVQ8AwgObKu6JDtjJlG3dtRbsNj9JjOAOVznF0SqZa5CAg8-lwSdM34iTvVTANddpqzcglX7EaLzGK4XnVncpZ-qt7rsoO79ybBRX3ucccVhRgvlha2z-k3VyDWPIeMlMcEut6RcZS965d55Bjok6l5JABBZKB-FIZkt5fX8rDVcqh3XfLA31RQYj0Yu6CwMZbcYpOdT8xZjTMWbR2FCKMAx8WVtHQy_1au5zssNGWnuxn23_ckD9nWWwm8RN24DyfYi7rQul4rtsPTTwiuvK8tscUsrXiG9T5GxrMM8s&c=RNZYrPhonnMLik_Dki3UYRqpDeQF-ky2k-2QrMmwrqrxERhNPKV2jw==&ch=t9LS8zkmPJxImMJcdo87zUSiR-4mELOJ-ohuw4ie-m5xRQaEWiw9UQ==)

Friend, we did the impossible. The Democrats spent millions in dark money, tapped into our opponent's personal fortune, and spent $20+ million to defeat us -- but despite their best efforts and outspending us at every turn, we won.

But we can't stop now. Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us and this seat remains a top-target. We won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes. [**Can you chip in to our Grassroots Victory Fund to defend this seat from the Far Left and take back the House Majority?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NXh19ffb7_E46IttEAetzqvxEP5vL4QrlNrwkyXgxZMj5KFpDH5hwrXB0HgQ2A4pWKuC35fg0zbTUTpwOYvsylJgapJVChALC7YRMg3rpIfhntzOxCmeSLUwAl-mxu8GMS15FR7O4mNyiJJtd8mIS7EkJtOTBIuv2vgQVbmW5cTAUlIlvLkJsQo1E5YaNSl1L_6KlaSh9lYieRk5U4IVxaIm7n8NP-gqgW14b6x1RfOb8oNrmPbRrSizbibbjh6ZvbMcX6em_vtaX5vvaC1CZ7efqGbQKuUP5peUCSqNakOcNKpYEhEC5U4DZY67d9v9Tlu-IPaHgUvbqq22kwtVxhTstj1ikhOXghz5dJ2oJCh0LYfKqmFTgWCxw1f8eg-9Yxoc-BQmptzfzfSF-Qu42h1W0QPOnryJD3IqK8DYluFwUdpDu8qA9i3i8B8DJKOc&c=RNZYrPhonnMLik_Dki3UYRqpDeQF-ky2k-2QrMmwrqrxERhNPKV2jw==&ch=t9LS8zkmPJxImMJcdo87zUSiR-4mELOJ-ohuw4ie-m5xRQaEWiw9UQ==)

**We 're fighting to give Californians a voice **and bring common-sense to Congress. Our ability to lower taxes and prescription drug prices, get our economy back on track, create jobs, and cut the red tape that is burdening small businesses across our nation _relies_ on our ability to defend this top-target seat against Pelosi's deep pockets.

**We 're fighting to take back the House** and put an end to the Left's socialist agenda. Holding this seat is the key to taking back the House for Republicans and with only a handful of targeted seats, this is our best shot. _We can 't miss._

body:
Our most important mid-month fundraising deadline is almost here, %%First Name%%.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fSafhVOOhzK6Rxlamn4tonLRv603vVDo0_C79HtLXFctkQuy2X_amCbcdqFr89y-MAS_T-gvm7hQb87SnoLT-EkIyB4bufY1FB6l9Sk-iQAlg7bTSkIY2WSXwdR_8XQjvi3xORgqV3yxbrzCGCKINGDKD8pjHARTI9L7m-jSmloRWYTHCPqAMBj0UMFs4mTcwJ_m0yNp-E4InDzT-YZ_XbG_EO3LR4JkJb5NM8ZyE0cF1Gu2xuIYa2oRbJ2yqPNAEAg_E7SrNCTYZRQYGhqmzPNMzMKab16_XtfAjH9-D0TCYqhVHI8kxyfIoNqyNhtZUlKvnklf1bqA8vFU5c9N1qeel2VmC00mmAvtY-DXmob4s3EVhfd6yJftf9yvVMaU8G1VqgZ9cuK5b25l7vta-epe5KGjAZ1bM4sRc8N5N5T6PCXmfvFGFuVxQxbmVVxXKlBW2MaGQAY=&c=dB7n1i5wjsjRaLPcoauABcj_DtFos9HleXa2wHpCnrd77tg78cXVTQ==&ch=K7dYQBUVeYEWrTkbQLK002UyOi-cu4nc9eAgX0GYy-MAwablmET1uA==)
Friend,

As we get closer to the runoff election, it's starting to set in that radical socialists could have COMPLETE control over the U.S. Congress.

Everything that we love about our great nation is now on the line in Georgia, so if we allow the RADICAL Left to WIN these two Senate seats in January, _**President Trump 's AMERICA FIRST Agenda will be DESTROYED.**_

body:
"Make Them Pay"
Have you seen this headline Friend?
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c4NAsC6xgpOD161Bx9_muxWFdtfhodi6JjBxJQkfdFHwT6zrxg6WgIusYJ_aMgqixe_7LsrQsIcLLtVu9NDyJYMh2cF2R-xS4WVeYNa2O1xReJpffgFqELVkMC7WI1u_v63GpFcOkd3epR68F6hUi8DebQEZb8gOoalPbpStZKIlQ5gAq0nhH9fFEefURSlsHuGA1imk3jMMj861bqgtCD-OGqq2oi59G7O-s8gD1h2V38575sfcICFQ-BBefx44_DvMYm9CKxHD4MNFeHR_8veVXJoLWSnk8leaZBEX6_jWSLlfhx23dAnhG2pXeWoELYyGJEAMWJbSYOKOLFKRyM11fejAkDYBq04HsfwvkAg-gvm15qlCkWk36-N2GuSn36wpc_1lKNScnLCsCcO8wu5PxaelOQnJloUNVr1Q-ymluNsctDbLa_oQIM6_wuLIWk70EoDscpRJf1aDx5_TqzTn3M9kBjmVPVfGxrOZhpE=&c=4x2ohOpAOLRZB9ebu-KwzB-Sp9Hj6lYgZaKYztMUpvSnFjnF_a4Dog==&ch=8GebwmEVgG3-DrTnPROTZyZ-A8uq4z2iIjexhK1wmsRPNiWaPLoEHA==)
In a video posted to Facebook on Tuesday, **Democratic State Representative Cynthia Jones warned "Trumpers" to "be careful" and she called on her "soldiers" to find supporters of President Trump to "make them pay". **
This is just one of too many instances of threats of violence against conservatives during 2020.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. Friend,

Chuck Schumer's plans for America if Democrats take back the Senate is devastating:
* Raise taxes on America's middle class
* MORE burdensome regulations on small businesses
* Defund the police and resources used to defend our border
* Pack the courts with liberal activist judges

[**CHIP IN $10 NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010wnZcR8Ddp7iMDJE3g9nKMl8fiDLIrax3P1fBgb1SJ2NOF4b8BGUI9POBzhI75eRpCP3ywmbyBcNcWW-QXfBqWhfl-jAgEjCwC090M9IJPagSWJAqwk1OEwlpUYjvbnxU99Wb-WM3IWMvXUvQaCsGc44Nf4BwyiBOeFEIa7iDU2RmktITRPuPE0H0XlhbN3YYtwOSl82NY167knmG9qyNS7EDkRoHPVzBWzBJo-fq9cSIrw7R2ndEOEAqFbOZHwtRejhCGn-FdNHgdI7565jAtJ5TrAI23ewSxOA_-OjisrSzxuAlhIWRavGD73OiV7z-ptJT583TIZAQADiNBae3yilNFgbnMiOreajM4VW0IC4o1kETDIGUqM7dHOud1elt3P-dQawlL1s1LJvCJ02z3oJjvfR1O2vIwpX-6EQhOTaT4mVXMrr_wP9xkF2pdx0TjTN1aYP9dLGa3FNOLnGMw==&c=vJ-6upbrwvqFSku8uzuKJvivEh8vqVXXcdrjN1f0Bfndvp_6nRw6tg==&ch=UUdtYnDOyB22RdKZoi13lIzCHGSnUiYz3zmLfUuxiKqvWue6mC7htg==)

Hoosier Republican,

We are under four weeks away from the critical Senate runoffs in Georgia, and your help is crucial!

President Trump hosted a rally in the Peach State last weekend to get out the vote — it is all hands on deck!

Both of Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats are facing runoffs on January 5th, and if we don’t win them for the GOP, the Democrats could have TOTAL control in Washington.

With Joe Biden in the White House and Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker’s Office, there is no telling what they will come up with.

President Trump and our fellow Hoosier Vice President Mike Pence have called for Republicans across the nation to put their support behind Republicans Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue in Georgia!

That’s why we are holding this moneybomb event. With your help, we’re working to raise $10,000 by December 15th to help Kelly and David win these races!

Will you please join them in saving America’s future by sending your best gift now?

CHIP IN $5 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-georgia-support-1-121020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_georgia_support_1_121020&amount=5&mc_cid=c181768ce0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Jim Oberweis
subject: Our data team made a big discovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/790f2be7735fd436c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, As you know, my team and I have been hard at work, along with countless volunteers, lawyers, data experts and others, fighting hard to make sure every LEGAL vote is counted in this critical 14th district race.
In that effort, our data team has made an interesting and incredibly important discovery.
**Over 5,000 individuals who voted by mail or early voted also submitted a change of address with the post office BEFORE the election.** [**Fund 1 Hour Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/a0aafad0402c8439c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund Half A Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/84adfaee663e7b33c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Full Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/733cc042f4a60803c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Hour Of Attorney Fees**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/10ff5f192e2bff53c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Add your best possible contribution**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/7e5dc4f49f4c419bc3d6b838967d376c/34533) That’s right. Unexplained phenomena like this are a disgrace to our Democracy and all the more reason we need to be vigilant and INSIST that every legal avenue be taken to ensure the integrity of our election process.
Another thing I have said before, which it is incredibly important to remember in the face of this unprecedented media glossing-over of the facts, is what a “discovery recount is.” Contrary to what the complicit media want you to believe – a discovery recount does not change a single vote, but **_it does allow us to see if the outcome might change with a full recount_**. This is about election integrity, and we need your help to see it done.
[Will you chip in $10 or more right now to help our discovery recount efforts?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/b31ad03e0edc8b6ec3d6b838967d376c/34533) For the win,
Jim Oberweis | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/c7b8624116c4f077/f93da940dc960bb7c3d6b838967d376c/34533)

clean_body: Peter, As you know, my team and I have been hard at work, along with countless volunteers, lawyers, data experts and others, fighting hard to make sure every LEGAL vote is counted in this critical 14th district race. In that effort, our data team has made an interesting and incredibly important discovery. Over 5,000 individuals who voted by mail or early voted also submitted a change of address with the post office BEFORE the election. That’s right. Unexplained phenomena like this are a disgrace to our Democracy and all the more reason we need to be vigilant and INSIST that every legal avenue be taken to ensure the integrity of our election process. Another thing I have said before, which it is incredibly important to remember in the face of this unprecedented media glossing-over of the facts, is what a “discovery recount is.” Contrary to what the complicit media want you to believe – a discovery recount does not change a single vote, but it does allow us to see if the outcome might change with a full recount. This is about election integrity, and we need your help to see it done. For the win, Jim Oberweis | | Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee id:2020-12-01-16:16:32:978t

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Urgent Senate Update: Where I Stand on the Bipartisan COVID Relief Package
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501148523%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate_%2bWhere%2bI%2bStand%2bon%2bthe%2bBipartisan%2bCOVID%2bRelief%2bPackage%2b\(copy%2b2\)%250115534.22185054.4976860.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501148523%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate_%2bWhere%2bI%2bStand%2bon%2bthe%2bBipartisan%2bCOVID%2bRelief%2bPackage%2b\(copy%2b2\)%250115534.22185054.4976860.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **December 12, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | As a country, we find ourselves at a pivotal moment in the fight against this pandemic and economic crisis. Coronavirus cases are surging, families are struggling to put food on the table, and small businesses are running on fumes. Nineteen million workers are receiving unemployment benefits and twenty-one percent of Americans are behind on rent. With no additional unemployment relief in sight and the federal eviction moratorium set to expire on December 31st, families will have nowhere to turn this holiday season. It would be unconscionable for the House and Senate to adjourn this month without completing a coronavirus emergency response bill. We have a chance to deliver on real relief right now and must move forward to pass a substantive package that shores up faltering small businesses, extends unemployment benefits, and gets emergency relief where it's needed most.

Last week, members of the House and Senate announced a bipartisan proposal for a new COVID-19 package. I'm glad that lawmakers on both sides of the aisle were able to come together and put a plan on the table, and I was pleased that many of Maryland's priorities were included. This package makes important progress on provisions that will help Americans weather the storm this winter, including an extension on expanded unemployment benefits and the federal eviction moratorium, as well as rental and food assistance. It would also provide an infusion of funds to many of the programs that are key features of the bipartisan CARES Act like the Paycheck Protection Program (an improved version more targeted to those small businesses most in need) and aid to state and local governments to prevent layoffs of teachers and emergency personnel. In addition, the current plan includes necessary resources for testing, tracing, and vaccine distribution.

Over the past few days, I have worked with my colleagues to include a number of provisions I've been fighting for since the beginning of the pandemic - including vital funding to extend economic relief for families and small businesses, help close the digital divide, support our transit systems, and bolster SNAP and other nutrition assistance programs. While it isn't perfect and we still need to see more details on the final package, I believe this bipartisan plan offers an important framework for discussions so we can send a stopgap measure to the President's desk and get our country through these tough winter months. Moving forward, the Biden-Harris Administration will need to work with Congress to deliver more relief to beat this pandemic and build back better.

The bipartisan stimulus plan holds potential for real compromise on emergency relief. But Republican Leader Mitch McConnell has already begun to throw cold water on this initiative. After refusing to hold a vote on the House-passed HEROES Act for over seven months, McConnell is once again blocking efforts to get emergency aid to the American people. And instead of engaging in good-faith negotiations, McConnell has been peddling his own partisan plan that puts big corporations first and gives tax breaks for three-martini lunches while leaving workers behind. Instead of collaborating with lawmakers, the Majority Leader has outsourced his leadership in Congress to the White House. McConnell's current proposal is not only wholly inadequate - it is an effort to take advantage of this crisis to pass measures that will end up hurting the American people.

If Congress doesn't pass a relief package fast, the economic situation could get much worse for families across our state and our country. As we continue working to fund the government by next week's deadline, we must also include much-needed coronavirus relief in this year's spending package and prevent crucial support programs from expiring. The government has a moral responsibility to deliver for the American people in a moment of crisis like this, and I won't let up in this fight until we get a substantive bipartisan plan across the finish line.

Chris Van Hollen
---
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.22185054.4976860.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.22185054.4976860.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.22185054.4976860.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.22185054.4976860.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15534.22185054.4976860.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|

Hey Derek, making sure you didn't miss this one. Terry announced the biggest, boldest investment in our education system in Virginia history. He wants to ensure that every kid in the Commonwealth has access to a world-class education. **[Will you add your name and co-sponsor his plan to make the biggest investment in education in Virginia’s history?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuzCI9ATzRRtHGCuyXBcLWMtm7jMSNyrkzSt25LzdH4cGtv_M1jEkWwgO3nKFQNipOIURTv0sfgKtq6s8Ibnut_sACHa5XFFG8yX8aVhi88vLZpdUzsZM-ANp4fEh9YI1HjFDXNruCVjH8BybQxm_fU8UWQeZinnMCvvqftc_zlSMlC0rNNn2gkg9h8OLIfDDwIRxR64AvK1WGbPzMJ70MWwpOszKUSCKFme3gYoKclDYDOrNCEYCcfUytAh91uf9CKIBdABQtTQncSI18FBdSf7ucxtz6ljLfIzcd_WMPkuo/37n/aio1-csmT4Kn7WX1SM9EVQ/h1/au5A1JAoN7ye8nbZnVVQUjbUNtnI4hj0cNpnqZwFSmc) ** Attaching his note to you below,
Chris
_\---Forwarded message---_
| Support my plan to go big for Virginia's kids and schools. Can you sign on and show your support?

| [**SIGN ON**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuzCI9ATzRRtHGCuyXBcLWMtm7jMSNyrkzSt25LzdH4cGtv_M1jEkWwgO3nKFQNipOIURTv0sfgKtq6s8Ibnut_gVm9AdI_FnWoEKRlQcHrAcSjmT02aAx_BkeRfTZdeQGizqxT7tEFirfZZ-pKph9raTLBfyO4br7bYh2epWnKA_kPZWZiDj6iY63GDUDnYSdQcOgJqGhrcBjUpPEEdboepdc3gFfCGI2_8ayELSvNp5aRm4_9H2wM8qHyJ_IF-2_biX_E3qJclZjojy9mjWEDSj7GQlPqbFugbXHbAu2cmQ/37n/aio1-csmT4Kn7WX1SM9EVQ/h2/Gq6IUse0H7eI7BaBfuahMtbSATUMsPVYaDz4lm2cb88)
---
Derek,
**Yesterday I announced that I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia and I wanted to tell you why.**
When Virginians helped elect Joe Biden as our next President, we didn’t just fire Donald Trump, we fired Betsy DeVos, the worst Secretary of Education in our nation’s history.
It’s a huge step forward, but even after Trump and DeVos, we’ve still got a lot of work to do to repair Virginia’s broken education system.
Did you know Virginia is 50th out of 50 states in teacher pay compared to average pay? **We’re dead last behind every state.**
It’s wrong. It’s way past time to think big, be bold, and invest in our kids and our schools.
That’s why I’m proposing the largest investment in our students, schools and educators in Virginia’s history. As governor, I will dramatically raise teacher pay and address the racial disparities in our education system.
Our educators of Virginia are the lifeline for our children's future and deserve to be treated as such.
**So it’s time to go big and I need your help. Will you add your name and co-sponsor my plan to make the biggest investment in education in Virginia’s history?**
The link between education, jobs, and rising incomes is basic economics. If you don’t have access to good schools, quality educators, and a system that’s as diverse as our Commonwealth, you won’t get the education you need to succeed.
It’s just common sense.
With your help, we can create good 21st Century jobs and build a future that lifts up Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth.
**These aren't pie in the sky ideas -- my plan can and will put the Commonwealth on the right track to providing access to an equitable, world-class education for all Virginia children.****[If you're ready to change our state's education system for the better, add your name now →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuzCI9ATzRRtHGCuyXBcLWMtm7jMSNyrkzSt25LzdH4cGtv_M1jEkWwgO3nKFQNipOIURTv0sfgKtq6s8Ibnut_pyke2gLRpvjYhU0sDSUKPC-QUq_bpifPeUuFX03kXbC6hGQvCNFwIbkyJwQSVM5TA8I9o6b4plOkz5QL3vMkN9Msiyv8ZlPCEBJbLYIOssmCDrIsGb1GxxKG9gx3vOueILz-cv3nW_ohheb1ysPRvi7YU_pX_PtOHEhDREpVjgjHFpruLexHBLqCRMRqYMjuVhQk1t6JmQscnbd6FWPcGk/37n/aio1-csmT4Kn7WX1SM9EVQ/h3/Sx3DnjH7A987qe32e_R9KMPBaqvtXH72cKa31JoHvJE)**
Thank you,
Terry

[**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOXGON6WsDPnOv_oJf7z4jXFBF4N71cDtalLtf2_c7xyazHhS1iJgKXCmaVGoyTpFil5-seMdpsx5Yw7i-uLUQdP3IEtLSDLYy8Wxy_oCkwomne5NO6b9FXltAhqsV-mEylk9nN0oZNGWVgdNPTkE-jSXy-oFD_KLLZd6DSzDG0YSbI5yNZBKM7o7xXEQeaC_uA5cJ2mzsSNaHMYUS_LtvQv_GiT6JlfCFlqRYE5O6kiGuLN4OHj85bQRukVPOQEDYC1EtRauUYI7qTBReL7JpLk/37n/aio1-csmT4Kn7WX1SM9EVQ/h4/jwwJsLR2FLBGDH40vXOTQfN85tzZVkJ4Whn1rJknErs)

body:
****
We won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes. With the House Majority on the line, you can't afford to sit this one out.

[](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=7d4bd621091d4e1fa974fd346bb4de6c&_e=JoToTFM9S13cu75KpcWJmu1PYisOOMSCmYbdGk_CdmILyzaHB2YA2v7_tUiRrtx9ATsRBb5vEctOwxuF0U7isDHhr1iug_uNIcjmYjOMI9iaU7OCpZVkoOJRLdXPwlgxtvCY2G6b4S-c5MoI8cjY0yGXExxctPfgfcU4pqbhmrEEnUCdlnNl2ytWElGITrxv45DdmK3XIVwIp3YgWW-_IDppQIXjts1UWgfo-9ubn7Rdq1CY5c_SkDObij1jPxDNvrixfaWZeE282hlI7OvhqdqfFVJ0PlwrS8PzcXsoAuzDZEekslWdcW3w_Tz3-j_hn860rxCpRMuiE38ZlZ8IJ7f97WXhtLsprVwKNarEcOgYfWu-XOETgyzORoGTK9laPufuOmF4FOdKpvPPsrEK9vSg-T92c0btBmI484nhTfjKLzv2C4LVHFSBCCIjrm7w-sCNDBG2BrmFDjClmjm-E-kY4joNuV6EmoLXFUpsuZW0pEw9qZ2IB3eX2l7gKp1E0PyfF5rYDbHnv6krPvyyq1UxAhVMRaAeFuKg-iZcoTw%3D)
---
Peter, we did the impossible. The Democrats spent millions in dark money, tapped into our opponent's personal fortune, and spent $20+ million to defeat us -- but despite their best efforts and outspending us at every turn, we won.

But we can't stop now. Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us and this seat remains a top-target. We won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes. subject: Stacking the odds against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
We've been under fire for the last two years and are no stranger to the Left's attacks. So believe me when I say this fight will be long, hard, and tough but it is a fight we can win if we fight together.

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00151mxECXh-DxNGFw68MAo2kGkrapgZzYfwy_EyY2f005TqUfzch6lnLiV-qLz3k085dxeN9qYKh_s_l6TC64OgJ-l5jHH9W2zNseIGBao0twmxv2l9-f6-r3e7PPqd_qm-Tjqclx38qhDKu1gJ0SR1K6sztVF1MjsqAHU6qK3Xr2f2ZILuUW0oMJZ2nLxXs95SfB65ArxRKxBmx-OJAk0bmAYwTW-aUB5dVbFB92qlusfAuixenUSik7MmP_eQkfvDvGnE8QcX2GHQHpHbVwJC3FGzG0xVuoEsHflHcWzH6w3JBF1AptZH6hxvWPANa4RFlFvCiCUNuDUxul6bT1VxMeB3xXB7mrDLRhgsRbAl3aZRjjduGs8WaalxNm3Y34u-x7rFAF1gxRqKs7rpTk5lWjTFKktWc1-qU0hbVRcXSg=&c=VCjWTSkuAzkepa24tQxqVLdO0LboKAoZn0DdLbAUj2bfnD0WQHDfYw==&ch=1lG0Z-obamrvxGrvpw2iyRLsdW6-JBpBc73lP7gnFfkrQtkZPB-23A==)
**FIRST:** The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 against us, outspending us 3:1.

**AND:** Cook Political Report rated this race as "Lean D," stacking the odds against us.

**THEN:** We defeated our Far Left opponent and flipped this seat from blue to red.

**NOW:** Our opponent is preparing for a rematch and we remain a top-target.

Friend, the stakes have never been higher. We need to flip only a handful of seats to take back the House for Republicans, but now Nancy Pelosi is more determined than ever to replace every last conservative patriot with a socialist puppet.

**That 's why we need your help: [Can you chip in $4 right to help fight back against the Left's attacks?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00151mxECXh-DxNGFw68MAo2kGkrapgZzYfwy_EyY2f005TqUfzch6lnH2ekF9Nqb_dkLk6vxmanQYAk22CPgWUoUYohLriR71OtAAPzs-__czlEJ0rTaboJ_mS_2AUl8VGmK7GVKX1YJud86txUR3MDWgRic_chMIABPTNqibKuL6FFOh-54zURGYJxckHPeAj0ifMMf4g-dq7jD2MMsy3QWh-xUhOIa5wJoswsbmhrQGccsG3ALP3yGleM4fZz8zkxSQobi6y67rzcfZXzfkYLZTHx_Y2A3KPhXYaSXAJc1UmHYMjI0NiAfwpn5bAY96tLUYN_cKB1-qba_Yj0PUmlzghBH8k7u_mqWjLXCZzsLZJsHRSKS8GsiGz2ibOBtm8QdC7EG86yxaqqJvh-nbAduebYCklGw0Io6-koVZb6HONuGt3Hc3Tq3bcuu6aw_cF&c=VCjWTSkuAzkepa24tQxqVLdO0LboKAoZn0DdLbAUj2bfnD0WQHDfYw==&ch=1lG0Z-obamrvxGrvpw2iyRLsdW6-JBpBc73lP7gnFfkrQtkZPB-23A==)** We only flipped this seat from blue to red a few weeks ago and we're at the top of Pelosi's targeted list.

We've been under fire for the last two years and are no stranger to the Left's attacks. So believe me when I say this fight will be long, hard, and tough but it is a fight we can win if we fight together.

But we have to start now. What we do now will go a long way to affecting the outcome of this race. With the Democrats desperate to win control and Pelosi laser-focused on flipping this seat back to blue, your support right now is critical.

The House Majority hinges on this seat, Friend. [**Can we count on you?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00151mxECXh-DxNGFw68MAo2kGkrapgZzYfwy_EyY2f005TqUfzch6lnH2ekF9Nqb_dI7giEMFfwPeqqekGdmfxBWW6AIMfQ_v2dQ_gCdFXE0VUbkxb-JYmsKK5aIFAPP-9P-jIBmlxgCg_OUtzQzH6_xrp1ad6XmVs8vKoyaaS32tLp_3qENmoFrXBX98NjoX2aQRJmuFhMuyD1lVg1IqVX5xIqjjGpdPZJultqLPcYauAFL6U8glM2Gnp24OyzTWypudQUGnMXtsDzltCAiz-foDvYBiPZBRmpN2VqCdz8jL3NdSAaoH-NxvCyMdhoVnBDzurTZ5oicFxzldMuaSyhBdxw5H14ZNF7KleeqHFRrIAxnb0GLf11nrAjim4OrNgt_zJOGCf7kmCWITTHyjGX2TJ6Tx7hU9m5jKtQu8lNRs=&c=VCjWTSkuAzkepa24tQxqVLdO0LboKAoZn0DdLbAUj2bfnD0WQHDfYw==&ch=1lG0Z-obamrvxGrvpw2iyRLsdW6-JBpBc73lP7gnFfkrQtkZPB-23A==)

Thank you,

Caeli
Team Steel

clean_body: We've been under fire for the last two years and are no stranger to the Left's attacks. So believe me when I say this fight will be long, hard, and tough but it is a fight we can win if we fight together. . == FIRST: The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 against us, outspending us 3:1. AND: Cook Political Report rated this race as "Lean D," stacking the odds against us. THEN: We defeated our Far Left opponent and flipped this seat from blue to red. NOW: Our opponent is preparing for a rematch and we remain a top-target. Friend, the stakes have never been higher. We need to flip only a handful of seats to take back the House for Republicans, but now Nancy Pelosi is more determined than ever to replace every last conservative patriot with a socialist puppet. That 's why we need your help: == We only flipped this seat from blue to red a few weeks ago and we're at the top of Pelosi's targeted list. We've been under fire for the last two years and are no stranger to the Left's attacks. So believe me when I say this fight will be long, hard, and tough but it is a fight we can win if we fight together. But we have to start now. What we do now will go a long way to affecting the outcome of this race. With the Democrats desperate to win control and Pelosi laser-focused on flipping this seat back to blue, your support right now is critical.
