Friend,
Wow, what a year. I have been grateful for your continued support ever since I WALKED AWAY from the Democrat Party last year and joined President Trump in fighting for a Strong America. I've always aligned more with the Conservative values of the Republican Party, and with how far Left the Democrats have shifted, the choice couldn't have been any easier. The decision to join the Republican Party was one of the best I've ever made, and I don't regret it for a second.
In the past year, I have fought against the Radical Left's plan to DEFUND the Police, fought for stronger borders, and was [_**the first Republican to defeat a Kennedy**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x6qetu0yi53MTAyTxQjGDWvmHpLmuHyJlF_rc6AgKwX9U_76-3PtWTws6254Igolmd1RXFAHBEpsDrTlVdqPOaW1V9OR5vcpmb7OFQlgYD-0LJmlzQaSnnfcnmv6rhYrmdVxIJzJ_HXRScDqYgEKiu68a3pisk3JJzO4bA-TPyqlZNWeNXw5CmpDCglju3KOK5W611__onvS56yAdqut9zK6ux20xc3OaDwdlDxfzVMsMOBCfDBqpHxC7Va7JVXz8zP8Db_ImZ4SCgfUFtGY3X-YCZgbC_4eVUX4Eowfd9o5I5OpCFwvWmS50A-PqAvoEK9cXeYfV1XfcizJvriwYb0l1UacseQ_m9c4bZxz9LLl0u_IM32XRbkyWy5mwKf382OMWLmRSolhKt9SAttXtIs2ANx9V9Jxb4j00H7CWoNjUSa7wQEQv75j5ILQMoOdxNHo_u65cBHSxRHObe6gnu7BE0fb38slT34e2zGZRI7-ysxwyVCZmw==&c=9eoK-J3BDGjDHYaK7xtCMtP4r3eEg8s1NeAQCLEjmStMEXcNu1L0Bw==&ch=7LHSMBcPtTi8Cl57xjvbq0AisoS6xnmiRUnDPu4DTcwpMSlmCA52uw==) \-- and that was all possible because of your continued support.
[_**Friend, can I continue to count on your support in Congress?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x6qetu0yi53MTAyTxQjGDWvmHpLmuHyJlF_rc6AgKwX9U_76-3PtWTws6254Igolmd1RXFAHBEpsDrTlVdqPOaW1V9OR5vcpmb7OFQlgYD-0LJmlzQaSnnfcnmv6rhYrmdVxIJzJ_HXRScDqYgEKiu68a3pisk3JJzO4bA-TPyqlZNWeNXw5CmpDCglju3KOK5W611__onvS56yAdqut9zK6ux20xc3OaDwdlDxfzVMsMOBCfDBqpHxC7Va7JVXz8zP8Db_ImZ4SCgfUFtGY3X-YCZgbC_4eVUX4Eowfd9o5I5OpCFwvWmS50A-PqAvoEK9cXeYfV1XfcizJvriwYb0l1UacseQ_m9c4bZxz9LLl0u_IM32XRbkyWy5mwKf382OMWLmRSolhKt9SAttXtIs2ANx9V9Jxb4j00H7CWoNjUSa7wQEQv75j5ILQMoOdxNHo_u65cBHSxRHObe6gnu7BE0fb38slT34e2zGZRI7-ysxwyVCZmw==&c=9eoK-J3BDGjDHYaK7xtCMtP4r3eEg8s1NeAQCLEjmStMEXcNu1L0Bw==&ch=7LHSMBcPtTi8Cl57xjvbq0AisoS6xnmiRUnDPu4DTcwpMSlmCA52uw==)
[**Yes, you can count on me, Jeff!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x6qetu0yi53MTAyTxQjGDWvmHpLmuHyJlF_rc6AgKwX9U_76-3PtWTws6254Igolmd1RXFAHBEpsDrTlVdqPOaW1V9OR5vcpmb7OFQlgYD-0LJmlzQaSnnfcnmv6rhYrmdVxIJzJ_HXRScDqYgEKiu68a3pisk3JJzO4bA-TPyqlZNWeNXw5CmpDCglju3KOK5W611__onvS56yAdqut9zK6ux20xc3OaDwdlDxfzVMsMOBCfDBqpHxC7Va7JVXz8zP8Db_ImZ4SCgfUFtGY3X-YCZgbC_4eVUX4Eowfd9o5I5OpCFwvWmS50A-PqAvoEK9cXeYfV1XfcizJvriwYb0l1UacseQ_m9c4bZxz9LLl0u_IM32XRbkyWy5mwKf382OMWLmRSolhKt9SAttXtIs2ANx9V9Jxb4j00H7CWoNjUSa7wQEQv75j5ILQMoOdxNHo_u65cBHSxRHObe6gnu7BE0fb38slT34e2zGZRI7-ysxwyVCZmw==&c=9eoK-J3BDGjDHYaK7xtCMtP4r3eEg8s1NeAQCLEjmStMEXcNu1L0Bw==&ch=7LHSMBcPtTi8Cl57xjvbq0AisoS6xnmiRUnDPu4DTcwpMSlmCA52uw==) _[**No, I support the Radical Left**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x6qetu0yi53MTAyTxQjGDWvmHpLmuHyJlF_rc6AgKwX9U_76-3PtWTws6254Igolmd1RXFAHBEpsDrTlVdqPOaW1V9OR5vcpmb7OFQlgYD-0LJmlzQaSnnfcnmv6rhYrmdVxIJzJ_HXRScDqYgEKiu68a3pisk3JJzO4bA-TPyqlZNWeNXw5CmpDCglju3KOK5W611__onvS56yAdqut9zK6ux20xc3OaDwdlDxfzVMsMOBCfDBqpHxC7Va7JVXz8zP8Db_ImZ4SCgfUFtGY3X-YCZgbC_4eVUX4Eowfd9o5I5OpCFwvWmS50A-PqAvoEK9cXeYfV1XfcizJvriwYb0l1UacseQ_m9c4bZxz9LLl0u_IM32XRbkyWy5mwKf382OMWLmRSolhKt9SAttXtIs2ANx9V9Jxb4j00H7CWoNjUSa7wQEQv75j5ILQMoOdxNHo_u65cBHSxRHObe6gnu7BE0fb38slT34e2zGZRI7-ysxwyVCZmw==&c=9eoK-J3BDGjDHYaK7xtCMtP4r3eEg8s1NeAQCLEjmStMEXcNu1L0Bw==&ch=7LHSMBcPtTi8Cl57xjvbq0AisoS6xnmiRUnDPu4DTcwpMSlmCA52uw==)
If you are tired of the Socialist games of the Radical Left like Socialist darling AOC and Nancy Pelosi, it is crucial that you join me in the fight for a Strong America. This fight against the Radical Left won't be easy, but with you on our team, I know we can put an end to their Radical agenda and keep fighting for a Strong America.

name: Tim Burchett
subject: TIMtalk December 11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Dec. 12, 2020 Thank you for reading TIMtalk, Congressman Tim Burchett's weekly newsletter. TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.
* * *
**Countdown in Georgia ⏰** In less than a month, Georgia voters will vote in a special election for two Senate seats that will determine which party controls the United States Senate. With Nancy Pelosi retaining control of the House of Representatives, we can't afford to allow Chuck Schumer to become the Senate Majority Leader. Remember, if the Democrats gain control, they have a long list of liberal policies they will try to jam down our throats. This election could decide the future of our country. [If you would like to get involved in the campaigns by donating, knocking on doors or making phone calls from home, sign up here!](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/EjtbusMbNR2wz4hO9YSm1A/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg)
* * *
**Remembering Wanda Moody 💔** Late last month the Knoxville community lost a paragon of public service, Wanda Moody. At age 91, Wanda left a legacy that will be remembered long after her passing. Wanda's career had great depth and breadth. She was a teacher in the old Knoxville city school system. She was a businesswoman, and earned her masters in education from the University of Tennessee at a time when many women did not pursue higher education. Perhaps her most lasting impact was in the political sphere. Wanda served as an official aide to multiple politicians and as an unofficial advisor to countless others, myself included. For 20 years, she was a staple on the Knox County Commission, always fighting for what she believed in. Wanda will be missed.

**-> Read more:** Wanda Moody, former educator, county commissioner, dies at age 91 ([WBIR](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/o6217pz763y8RcNjIhkZqodA/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg)) **-> Read more: **Former Knox County Commissioner Wanda Moody dies at 91 ([_Knoxville News Sentinel_](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/AKGLi7kt7NdMtVrtBzz7dA/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg))
* * *
**Just for Fun 🎄** [An Ohio landscaping business reported a fir tree had been cut down and stolen from its premises last week](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/C66LYdje0WQGUKF892XGVb1w/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg), no doubt to be used as a Christmas tree. Unfortunately for the thief, he or she did not realize the tree is not a Christmas tree at all, but a citrus-scented fir. The thief should be easily identified as the only person in town with a Christmas tree that smells like summer.
* * *
**Check out the Burchett Store 👕** Need some Team Burchett swag? We're here to help. We have hats, t-shirts, and stickers so you can support our campaign and our shared conservative values in style.
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/M7HthG892763f3t31i8yTz763f6g/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg)
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/X8dZXkzAsS763CZZFm763rj2UA/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/8DFkpG381L3eevkB6JV892RQ/GRMFgiQtm763uCZ892n892LbMXYg/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg)
* * *
PO Box 51345 Knoxville, TN 37950-1345 Paid for by Burchett for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/unsubscribe/Fc6SuitAsKVu8aWro763aKJJCNQw2PIOEJddCxdm6OxFg/YMRsBcTReUUnKfXoeAwy4w/JyQ6hGXXDhz8s1LWUhGrDg)

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYA9s2rgIFBtLqILCImsIw6Y2RVYBeXqrqBKmukFCJpUW2J4AaX5UxkIEbcRfQCzVY9UKaiwSzg0iHQcTOGXT2CGYhTBZL2AiW3wr3ST8PhK9cL70vpkWB80sUe9n1DVr_Q24ATWAMyIiswlxmm80Ql-rrsDSAasiyCToBwwcAZ8-pw8MMF7U9bLhLB6kD0rWrkDeNfT3KW8K7c8TTWQ-thDlpLB8uJGsucK6vmIl_MfXHhNcbrTHPXt-qFf2Nc1WmoFlH3TxlXDuMHB7BGBMhFXw1OcpRGbNWkMnGEh5ENLS5f6Syq5nR5WMOZS6bVcaWO4Gobu1gA_FxnjnWL5vJM/37n/4fGXqqwNROmJz9zvoy4VDg/h0/YWP2J_I4xi26ZCces3p2WRYZ9EJWZewk4Q4_Zun7LjQ)
Hi Derek, I want to make sure you saw what Hillary said about Terry. Hillary is a fighter. I can’t tell you how much it means to Terry and I to have her in our corner. **[Now, I'm hoping we can count on your support as well. Terry tells me we need to bring in 1,000 more Founding Donors by midnight tomorrow. Can you be one of them?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYA9s2rgIFBtLqILCImsIw7YtbhazmcXg0y4l_HGVANwQ9riwlHoBF_54CvLqguPMhxPC-jw4INZNHTPkukOfJNnBxqU3C4FELj0xiQgdDINccWQloSqGhjsDqy6xZwqIUUqdH4CkJAmevs_TgsGX5CUSSN7EX-7_w1wbLuH5eao4PCxKFVaFFN9DnZCcUP5r2pRR_rsnS_7pRrXReovvssli2Rm6E89Mh0_er1e7m7d2aPtflyHG9PkjGXflASuIFUXHycnNj0A5oOerzKREiRPXu1lPp-q6mfHsN2gu_44bp-dgbOiujF3QP4vd2u_KtQuxVSQt_UDMNql2VTsWvI/37n/4fGXqqwNROmJz9zvoy4VDg/h1/9mQnQzC3NcaJCU4Uh5gghLDQNRpevKvtDwwTT6iFjx8) ** I'm attaching Hillary's note below, Dorothy _
\---Forwarded message---_
Derek, Yesterday, my friend of more than 40 years shared this message with her 30 million Twitter followers: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYA9s2rgIFBtLqILCImsIw467p2phbNhlnY6NBhNnyk7kN6KferOyvKEmupCoP1MELGaq9gQhIv3FYyCdE5ddZxDlcqgCGjslFJzczAObsQtnYY1r22ixWI6bIj_6_LVxA1XqLOzL_CPKhO5l8HHqswdHEH92brY1UtC9PgklKOQnJI07SiwyaPQOxHQH8n7NIliZVFFN8aRhEEW3V982KBIEi9gVuuRaT1uoOgyM-jq1B6KcH72TRfd5bUXQZlQaF2nJaA50hViigIUNIoK9kbTEH3UHIqwKXI2P4Ef3l8hx4iZTwrZLxtxlr0Al5pkCQ6cYtOB5ZTz5s3h5z_54tM/37n/4fGXqqwNROmJz9zvoy4VDg/h2/eIiTVxiaIwofw1xFEkdXDa4o1oArmdm2Tq5E9yHF-9w)
